text:
The world’s top archers will meet in Paris to shoot for gold. Here’s a brief overview of what to expect.

Casey Kaufhold'schase for Olympic gold inwomen's archerycame to a shocking end when she lost to Lei Chien-ying of Chinese Taipei in the round of 32.

Kaufhold, 20, arrivedin Parislooking to become the first American woman to earn an individual Olympic archery medal since 1976.

Stream Philadelphia News for free, 24/7, wherever you are with NBC10.

She opened the day with a first-round win against Sylla Fatoumata of Guinea, but things quickly went sideways in her ensuing match. She fell behind 4-0 in her first two sets against Chien-ying and was unable to claw back, losing 7-3.

All three American archers are out of the women's individual event. Catalina GNoriega also lost in the round of 32, while Jennifer Mucino-Fernandez lost in the opening round.

Kaufhold still has a chance to reach the podium in Paris. She and fellow American Brady Ellison will go against Uzbekistan in the mixed team event round of 16 on Friday.
title: USA’s Casey Kaufhold stunned in second round of Olympic archery – NBC10 Philadelphia
description: Casey Kaufhold's chase for women's archery gold came to a shocking end, as the 20-year-old lost to Lei Chien-ying of Chinese Taipei in the second round.
